trigger: RUN-001 proved the five-direction package could run once, but follow-up review identified that it also had to become the default Loop behavior for other work.

change.orchestrator: globalcloud-loop-orchestrator now requires run/stop/verify/recover/debug for all non-readonly Loop work.
change.policy: LOOP_AUTONOMY_POLICY defines five-direction standing adoption across L1, L2, L3, L3.5, L4, and L5.
change.control_board: LOOP_CONTROL_BOARD records the five-direction capability as active for all Loop work.
change.template: loop-round-v2-five-direction.yaml marks the shape mandatory for L1-L5 except readonly QA.

next_constraint: all non-readonly Loop rounds must include run, stop, verify, recover, and debug; old input-action-output-check-feedback can only be an internal explanation.
